nasb.text: In the thickness of the wall of the court toward the east, facing the separate area and facing the building, there were chambers.

esv.text: In the thickness of the wall of the court, on the south also, opposite the yard and opposite the building, there were chambers

cnv.text: 在南面，沿著內院的牆也有房子，一排對著殿院的空地，一排對著南面的建築物。

ccb.text: 南面的院墙有两排厢房，一排在空地对面，一排在南面的建筑物对面，
